specs.title: root "/" redirects to /profiles
profiles page shows heading and create button
unknown route falls back to /profiles
profiles/new page shows the create profile form
back link on create-profile navigates to /profiles
empty profiles list shows empty state message
creates a new profile and appears in the list
create-profile form shows role options
shows error when password is too short
shows error for duplicate username
sign in with correct password navigates to persona page
sign in → select persona → lands on workspaces
sign in with wrong password shows error message
persona page shows welcome message with username
persona page shows all three role buttons
account lockout appears after 3 failed attempts
locked profile shows lockout badge on profiles list
canvas area is visible by default
canvas tab button is active by default
switching to Mutual Help tab shows mutual-help board
switching back to Canvas tab hides mutual-help board
chat panel is visible alongside canvas
footer shows "Offline ready" badge
footer shows tab id badge
header avatar bar shows own avatar initials
inbox button is visible in header
activity feed button is visible in header
clicking inbox button opens inbox panel
clicking inbox button again closes inbox panel
mutual help board shows create post options
empty workspace list shows empty state
creates a workspace and it appears in the list
creates a workspace using Enter key
Create button is disabled when input is empty
multiple workspaces appear in the list
clicking a workspace navigates to /w/:id
workspace layout shows workspace name in header
workspace layout has Canvas and Mutual Help tabs
back link in workspace returns to /workspaces
renames a workspace via the rename dialog
cancel rename dialog keeps original name
deletes a workspace and it disappears from the list
cancelling delete keeps the workspace
